reservations.title: Reservation Policy
reservations.content: Reservations are recommended and can be made up to 90 days in advance. Walk-ins are welcome subject to availability. We hold reserved tables for 15 minutes after the booking time before releasing them. For parties of 8 or more, a credit card is required to secure the booking. Children under 16 must be accompanied by a responsible adult.
reservations.deposit_required: For parties of 6+, we require a $10 per person deposit at time of booking.

cancellation.title: Cancellation & No-Show Policy
cancellation.standard: Cancel more than 24 hours before: Full refund of any deposit.
cancellation.late_cancellation: Cancel within 24 hours: $10 per person cancellation fee applies.
cancellation.large_party: For parties of 10+: 48 hours notice required for full refund.
cancellation.no_show: No-shows forfeit the full deposit amount.

dining.title: Dining Policies
dining.time_limit: Tables are allocated for up to 2 hours during peak times (Friday/Saturday evenings). Please inform us if you require longer.
dining.outside_food: No outside food or beverages are permitted except for celebration cakes (£15 cake-cutting fee applies).
dining.smoking: Kalai Restaurant is a non-smoking establishment including e-cigarettes. A designated outdoor smoking area is available.
dining.noise_level: We ask guests to maintain a reasonable noise level out of respect for other diners.

dietary.title: Dietary & Allergen Policy
dietary.statement: We take food safety and allergen management very seriously. All allergen information is available on our menu and through our staff.
dietary.allergen_disclaimer: While we take great care, our kitchen handles the 14 major allergens. We cannot guarantee a completely allergen-free environment.
dietary.special_diets: We cater to vegan, vegetarian, gluten-free (non-Coeliac), dairy-free, and other requirements. Please inform us when booking.
dietary.coeliac: For those with Coeliac disease: Please speak directly with the manager so extra precautions can be taken.

children.title: Children's Policy
children.welcome: Children are warmly welcomed at Kalai Restaurant.
children.under_3: Children under 3 eat free from the kids menu (1 free meal per paying adult).
children.high_chairs: High chairs and booster seats are available. Please request when booking.
children.children_menu: Kids menu available for children up to age 12. $9.99 includes main, side, and soft drink.

payment.title: Payment Policy
payment.service_charge: An optional 12.5% service charge is added to bills for parties of 8 or more.
payment.gratuity_guide: Suggested gratuity: 15% good service, 18% great service, 20% exceptional service.
payment.split_bills: We are happy to split bills up to 6 ways with advance notice.

private_events.title: Private Events Policy
private_events.minimum_spend: Private dining room: $500 minimum food spend on weekdays, $1,000 on weekends.
private_events.deposit: 25% non-refundable deposit required to secure the date.
private_events.catering: Custom menus available. Must be confirmed 7 days before the event.
private_events.alcohol: All alcohol must be purchased through Kalai Restaurant. No outside alcohol permitted.
private_events.av_equipment: Projector, screen, microphone, and PA system available. AV setup fee: $50.

loyalty.title: Kalai Loyalty Program
loyalty.description: Join our free loyalty program and earn points on every visit.
loyalty.earning: Earn 1 point for every $1 spent on food and beverages.
loyalty.bonus: Earn double points on your birthday month. Complimentary dessert on your birthday.
loyalty.sign_up: Sign up in restaurant, on our website, or download the Kalai app.

sustainability.title: Our Sustainability Commitment
sustainability.sourcing: We source 80% of our produce locally within 50 miles. Our meat and fish are ethically sourced and sustainably certified.
sustainability.waste: We are committed to zero food waste. Unsold food is donated to local food banks via Too Good To Go.
sustainability.packaging: All takeaway packaging is 100% compostable or recyclable.
sustainability.energy: Our restaurant runs on 100% renewable energy and we have a 4-star Green Tourism rating.
